_comment: Stage-2 refinement sweep for Task 2D.5 connectivity analysis. Densifies the band centre identified in the full sweep: V dropped to a single value (V is V^2-amplitude-redundant for the sign of the slacks), m0 densified across the [2.3, 3.7] band that the full sweep's m0=3 grid value missed. ~10080 points, ~50 min on cpu-xl, ~$0.80.
